title: ValhallaMMO
description: Specifically designed to counter the 2-week gameplay cycle. Keep players active for longer! (Also known from The Realm SMP!)
body:
We got a premium version too now! It's got a new Trading and Martial Arts skill, a lot of new items, and a very interesting overhaul to villager trades!
https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/valhallammo-premium-1-19-1-21-8.128164/

Image transcription ValhallaMMO Spigot/Paper/Purpur 1.19+ The most engaging free RPG-skills plugin available What is ValhallaMMO? A skill-based progression plugin like McMMO and AuraSkills, inspired by Skyrim ValhallaMMO overhauls vanilla progression to be more drawn out, and more rewarding. It gives players more opportunities to express themselves and to personalize their playthrough by making choices and specializing themselves. In a nutshell, it prevents players from rushing through the game and getting burnt out! Player features As a player, you'll be able to play with... - 13 different skills Designed to suit many different playstyles Each having detailed skill trees - 6 new weapon types Rapiers, Daggers, Morningstars, Warhammers, Greataxes, and Spears - A party system With a progression system that encourages collaboration, with EXP sharing and stuff - Powerful and versatile abilities Such as weapon coating, parrying, vein mining, tree capitator, transmutation, and more! - A unique and immersive block breaking system Damage dealt to blocks linger around for some time, kind of like in Terraria - Natural enemy difficulty progression! Enemies get harder as you get stronger - DPS damage indicators Including testing dummies to test your damage output With ValhallaTrinkets you'll also be able to find 16 trinket types, each granting various bonuses With ValhallaRaces you'll be able to pick a race and some classes to specialize your playthrough Alternative Content Servers may install alternative content packages to have a different ValhallaMMO experience - Classic (default) Most like vanilla Easiest to learn Recommended for simple, familiar experience - Classic Upgrades/tempering Medium gameplay overhaul, slight immersion Recommended as simplest non-vanilla experience Admin features ValhallaMMO also acts as a powerful toolset to give you, as owner, plenty of room to add your own content to the plugin. Such as... - An advanced and dynamic recipe manager Fully data driven, allowing you to make your own For crafting tables, furnaces, campfires, smithing, brewing, and two new immersive types - A similarly dynamic loot table manager! Including a replacement table manager allowing vanilla loot to be changed effortlessly. Works for entities, blocks, chests, archaeology, fishing, and piglin bartering - 100+ new attributes and potion effects! Such as armor penetration, multi-jumping, and lifesteal - Custom item registry To store and distribute your own custom items with - Extremely customizable, navigable skill trees Allowing you to make Valhalla's skill trees as large and complex as you like - MySQL data storage In case you want player progress to be cross-server, or accessible on your website! Links - Wiki - Discord
